articles.title: 25 AI AGENT PROMPTS FOR PRODUCT DEVELOPERS
articles.summary: Notion just released 25 ready-to-use AI agent prompts [4] that cover your entire product development cycle.

articles.title: AMERICA CANNOT LOSE THE ROBOTICS RACE
articles.summary: China has become the global leader in robotics by combining scale, precision manufacturing, and rapid iteration. To stay competitive, the US and its allies must foster freer experimentation and collaborate on a resilient robotics supply chain.

articles.title: SEO IS TANKING. HOW TO WIN WITH AEO/GEO
articles.summary: Answer Engine Optimization shifts from keywords to prompts, emphasizing clarity, structure, and citations for AI agents. Fast publishing, comparison content, and off-site syndication drive higher AI visibility, stronger leads, and better conversion rates.

articles.title: 11 HARD TRUTHS ABOUT WORKING IN GROWTH
articles.summary: Growth never “arrives”. Goals move, structures block, loops collapse, and retention beats acquisition every time. The best companies unify around one metric, build lovable products, and embrace the messy, temporary nature of growth.

articles.title: WE WERE HIRED TO DO THE GRUNT WORK
articles.summary: Tech employees often feel trapped in endless busywork, hoping AI will free them to do higher-value work. Yet new tools usually replace one kind of tedium with another, so the grind rarely goes away.

articles.title: BUILD AI AGENTS USERS ACTUALLY TRUST: FREE WORKSHOP
articles.summary: For PMs building production-ready AI agents who need to move beyond high accuracy to high adoption. Join us live to learn architectural patterns that create magical user experiences, not just smart responses. Deep dive into actual implementation using battle-tested open source tools like Strands while leveraging production services from AWS.

articles.title: PRODUCT METRICS TO USE INSTEAD OF VANITY METRICS
articles.summary: Vanity metrics like DAU create illusions of progress, while value metrics reveal true customer outcomes, retention, and revenue alignment. Shifting to outcome-based measures drives better decisions, sustainable growth, and product impact.

articles.title: HOW TO REDUCE AI HALLUCINATIONS WITH EVALS
articles.summary: AI hallucinations damage trust and sales. PMs can combat this with structured AI evaluations - setting goals, testing against ground truth, scoring outputs, and continuously monitoring to ensure reliability.

articles.title: 15 WAYS TO USE AI AT HOME (AND FILL YOUR AI PRODUCT TOOLBOX)
articles.summary: Starting with simple AI tasks builds prompt skills and workflow design. This helps PMs gradually gain confidence to create effective AI-driven solutions.

articles.title: WHY 95% OF AI PROJECTS FAIL AND HOW STARTUPS WILL WIN THE RACE
articles.summary: Large companies often fail at AI due to rigid workflows, talent gaps, and weak internal builds. Startups succeed by delivering adaptive tools, small high-value wins, and measurable business outcomes quickly.

articles.title: CHATGPT FOR PRODUCT
articles.summary: PM prompt toolkit for research, strategy, and analytics with crisp, cited, table-ready outputs.

articles.title: CULTURE PATTERNS FOR SETTING UP A NEW OFFICE IN ANOTHER COUNTRY
articles.summary: Cultural alignment in new offices thrives on seeding, rotation, autonomy, and local trust.
